subject: Fw: LSJ - Proposals
body_html:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, December 22, 2006 1:29:09 PM
Subject: FW: LSJ - Proposals

 

 

Rich Kahn

New York Strategy Group LLC

457 Madison Avenue

Fourth Floor

New York, NY 10022

tel  212-891-6430

fax 212-750-2408

rkahn@nysgmail.com

From: Doug Stine [mailto:doug@molyneuxstudio.com]
Sent: Friday, December 22, 2006 9:49 AM
To: Rich Kahn
Subject: FW: LSJ - Proposals

 

Dear Mr. Kahn

 

I also have these 3 other proposals that also do not have a deposit.

 

30273 – Is for the exterior window/doors of the office building.  I do not know if we were in charge of the purchase or the contractor.

30964 – Is for the limestone flooring in the pool area of the guest pool building.

30876 – Is for some jarres for the main house.

 

Thank you again

 

Doug Stine

Doug Stine
